metadata.title: Feedforward Loop Motifs as Universal Structural Primitives in Neural Network Attribution Circuits
metadata.description: Synthesizes results from 5 dependency experiments into LaTeX-ready paper sections and evaluates quality via section completeness, numerical claim accuracy, table data integrity, hypothesis-section map...
